title: Performant Multiplayer Modpack
description: A Modpack for any multiplayer server to enhance your client performance while being fully compatible with LabyMod.
body:
A fully client-side Fabric modpack with seamless LabyMod compatibility.
Improving the single- and multiplayer performance without losing any gameplay!
Unofficially tested, yet fully compatible with servers like GermanMiner.

For additional features, like improved view distance, OptiFine feature parity and many more, see [the companion modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/germanminer/).
